professional_summary: Experienced software engineer with 5 years of Python development and web application expertise. Proficient in building scalable backend systems and RESTful APIs.

work_experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed web applications using Python and Django framework
Built RESTful APIs serving 10,000 daily active users
Optimised PostgreSQL database queries reducing latency by 35%
Deployed microservices on AWS using Docker and Kubernetes
Implemented automated testing with pytest achieving 85% code coverage
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on feature specifications

work_experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Created data processing scripts using Python and Apache Kafka
Maintained cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP
Participated in code reviews and sprint planning
Worked with computer vision models for image classification

projects.name: Real-Time Event Pipeline
projects.description: Designed and deployed a real-time event processing pipeline using Kafka, AWS Kinesis, and Python that handles 500k events/day.

projects.name: Computer Vision Safety Tool
projects.description: Built a computer vision application using Python and TensorFlow to detect safety hazards in workplace images.
